title: Terminal Event Repair Audit
description: Intermediate artifact produced by audit_terminal_event_source_repair.py. Classifies terminal_event_unpriced rows into repair cases. Does not produce prices, actual_exit_date, or actual_sell_price, and does not unblock rows.

contract_ref.description: Path to the repair plan contract that governs this audit.

repair_policy_version.description: Version identifier of the repair policy contract.

snapshot_id.description: Snapshot identifier from the source data.

terminal_event_date.description: Date of the terminal event (e.g. delist date).

declared_last_tradable_date.description: Last tradable date declared by the terminal_event source.

actual_last_tradable_date.description: Actual last tradable date inferred from bars/tradability data. Must not be interpreted as actual_exit_date.

last_tradable_close.description: Close price on the actual last tradable date. May exist but must not be interpreted as actual_sell_price.

adj_factor.description: Adjustment factor on the actual last tradable date.

volume.description: Trading volume on the actual last tradable date.

terminal_event_source_degraded_flag.description: True when the terminal_event source is contract_degraded and source repair is required. A repair audit flag only; does not unblock the row.

terminal_exit_approximation_flag.description: True when the actual last tradable date is an inferred approximation rather than the declared date. A repair audit flag only; does not unblock the row.

source_repair_flag.description: True when source repair is required before pricing. A repair audit flag only; does not unblock the row.

declared_actual_ltd_diff_days.description: Calendar day difference between declared_last_tradable_date and actual_last_tradable_date. Positive when actual precedes declared.

still_hard_blocker.description: Must be true. No row is unblocked by this audit.

can_emit_terminal_priced_last_tradable_c.description: Must be false. This audit does not enable pricing.

required_next_step.description: Human-readable description of the next required step before this row can progress.
